title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 8–11, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I still haven't paid this restaurant back for what I did.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The situation here is getting a little crazy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The one who destroyed our fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He followed us all the way out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's come to kill all of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then... He's the one who destroyed KrieG's ship just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He looks like any normal guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And it doesn't seem like he's carrying any special weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you're looking for his weapon, then it's on his back...!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Y-you mean he cut that gigantic Galleon by swinging that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes... that "Hawk-eyed" man is a renowned swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: more renowned than any other swordsman in this world...

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
